changelog: CRASH FIX (DEV ONLY): The v1.44.14 badge focus glow used Modifier.padding((-6).dp) to bleed the glow past the badge edge. Compose rejects negative padding values with `IllegalArgumentException: Padding must be non-negative`, instantly crashing the card the moment it received focus. Replaced with a clean radial gradient that doesn't need negative padding — same visual halo, no crash. v1.44.3's ANR watchdog + breadcrumb instrumentation captured the exception in seconds; thanks for your patience.
